creator: guru@unixarea.de
text:
installed from ports:
xf86-input-vmmouse-12.6.9.tbz
xf86-video-vmware-11.0.1.tbz
xorg-7.5.tbz

X.org crashes during

# X -configure

after loading the vmware driver;

Segmentation fault: 11 at address 0x0

Fatal server error:
Caught signal 11 (Segmentation fault: 11). Server aborting


Please consult the The X.Org Foundation support 
	 at http://wiki.x.org
 for help. 
Please also check the log file at "/var/log/Xorg.0.log" for additional information.

How-To-Repeat: see above, fully reproduceable;
